Patch Set 1:

PS - no point to resubmit these patches until LU-3453 is fixed, a patch is in progress.

I have also updated the manuel
Uploaded patch set 2.
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3: Verified

Tests received by maloo, run on CentOS release 6.4/x86_64: (https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/3f535108-d9a1-11e2-8ecf-52540035b04c).  Ran 14 tests.  No failures.

Patch Set 3: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(10 inline comments)

See inline comments.

It would be nice to have some basic test added that at least calls llapi_hsm_import() followed by llapi_hsm_state_get() and stat() to verify that things look right and that the MDT has not just crashed or something.

Patch Set 3:

The full test is done in the copy tool patch with depend on this one (LU-2062), test 11 in sanity-hsm.
We did it this way to avoid doing a separate pgm just to test llapi calls (we use CT like lfs is used for other llapi calls).
The MDT test is also done through sanity 229 which create a released file and stat on it

Patch Set 3:

To clarify, the -1 was for the unnecessary inclusion of <attr/xattr.h>.

parents.subject: LU-3641 libcfs: Zero fill shrinker struct in cfs_set_shrinker

commit.subject: LU-3363 api: HSM import uses new released pattern
commit.message:
LU-3363 api: HSM import uses new released pattern

Import creates a released file using new RAID pattern flag
Import used a new ioctl() to implement the import in the
client kernel.
Add a -L|--layout option to lfs getstripe and lfs find

Signed-off-by: JC Lafoucriere <jacques-charles.lafoucriere@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I39103e6f90bd73dc09cde49086d223d717e41cd2
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/6536
Tested-by: Hudson
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
